# Syed Mohamad Arif — Freelance Mobile App & Web Developer in Malaysia

> Freelance mobile app and web developer based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. 5 years of experience building React Native, React, and Next.js apps for Malaysian and international clients. Creator of Hikayat Daily Global, Hikayat Diri, and LokalGig.

## About

Syed Mohamad Arif is a freelance Mobile App and Web Developer in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, specializing in React Native for cross-platform iOS and Android apps and React / Next.js for the web. He works across the full product lifecycle — UI/UX design and prototyping in Figma, development in TypeScript, testing, CI/CD, and store / cloud deployment. Currently a Mobile App Developer at Paywatch Malaysia and available for freelance engagements with Malaysian SMEs, startups, and international clients.

## Quick facts

- Name: Syed Mohamad Arif (also: Syed Arif, syedmhdarif)
- Role: Freelance Mobile App Developer · Frontend Developer · React Native Developer · Web App Developer
- Location: Sentul, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
- Experience: 5 years
- Current employer: Paywatch Malaysia
- Languages: English, Bahasa Malaysia
- Currencies invoiced: MYR, USD
- Service area: Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur, Petaling Jaya, Shah Alam, Selangor, Penang, Johor) + worldwide remote
- Notable creations: Hikayat Daily Global, Hikayat Diri, LokalGig
- Available for: freelance / contract web and mobile app development
